programme.title: My World Kitchen S2, Ep 2
programme.desc: OKIDO is a comedy adventure, science-educational series following a curious, adventure seeking and unruly monster called Messy as he finds the answers to everything a 3-5 year old child wants to know. Why do things fall down and not up? Where do echoes come from? Messy goes on incredible adventures with his two best friends, Zoe and Felix to find the answers. They are helped along the way by the bonkers science trio Zim, Zam and Zoom. Together they will fly to the moon, shrink to the size of atoms and fly on the back of a giant butterfly.

programme.desc: OKIDO is a comedy adventure, science-educational series following a curious, adventure seeking and unruly monster called Messy as he finds the answers to everything a 3-5 year old child wants to know. Why do things fall down and not up? Where do echoes come from? Messy goes on incredible adventures with his two best friends, Zoe and Felix to find the answers. They are helped along the way by the bonkers science trio Zim, Zam and Zoom. Together they will fly to the moon, shrink to the size of atoms and fly on the back of a giant butterfly.

programme.title: Rumah Ruben

programme.title: Rumah Ruben
programme.desc: tentang keseharian keluarga Ruben Onsu yang selalu FUN dalam menghadapi setiap masalah! Kehebohan demi kehebohan dari keluarga atau orang-orang terdekat, bahkan dari tamu-tamu spesial yang datang ke rumah. Eiitss.. Tapi RUBEN dan keluarga tetap happy!

programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun refuses to bribe the imperial painter, so he draws an ugly portrait of her, preventing her from being selected by the Emperor until they meet in person.

programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun tak mau menyuap seorang pelukis kekaisaran sehingga si pelukis menggambar potret jelek dirinya, yang membuatnya tak dipilih oleh Kaisar sampai mereka bertemu langsung.

programme.title: The Golden Sword
programme.desc: Bai Yu Lung's father mysteriously disappears one night, and for 10 years Bai searches for him in vain. Finally, he decides to head to the far northern part of the country with the hope that he can find a clue in that region.

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: This is a love story between an alluring fairy, Seventh Sister, who comes down from heaven to experience life in 70's Hong Kong, and a man who is running a debt laden orphanage.

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: Kisah cinta antara sesosok peri nan memikat yang turun dari surga untuk menjalani kehidupan di Hong Kong pada tahun 70-an dengan seorang pria yang mengelola sebuah panti asuhan yang terlilit hutang.

programme.title: Heaven Sword & Dragon Sabre 2
programme.desc: Only the union of the title weapons can save the six remaining martial arts sects who are vying for mastery.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: A car load of girls meets a car load of boys, and Ching Li and Paul Chin Pei fall in love. Yet the film turns out to be more like a Shakespearian tragedy than a beach-babe party.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Saat mobil yang ditumpangi sejumlah gadis berpapasan dengan mobil yang ditumpangi beberapa pria, Ching Li dan Paul Chin Pei jatuh cinta. Namun, kisah cinta mereka tidak berjalan mulus.

programme.title: The Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Assassin Chang and his brother Hung meet up with a soldier, Mu. Together, they form a small mountain army, but when Hung's wife arrives, emotions swell, and Mu leaves for the army. After long, Mu summons his friends to join him, but all the while, he has longed for Hung's wife, and tries to have Hung murdered. This treason forces Hung to take up arms against his former comrade.

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: Shaw Bros and TVB stars unite for Wang Feng's ensemble epic. Trouble is brewing when a gangster plans to change the Gossip Street residents' favourite hangout into a gambling den.

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: Bintang-bintang Shaw Brothers dan TVB bersatu untuk film epik karya Wang Feng ini. Masalah muncul ketika seorang gangster berencana untuk mengubah tempat favorit penduduk Gossip Street menjadi sebuah sarang perjudian.

programme.title: The Mirror And The Lichee
programme.desc: The curious title refers to two props that signal a happy beginning to what develops into a tragic love story between the scholar and a local beauty.

programme.title: The Mirror And The Lichee
programme.desc: Judul yang menarik tentang dua tiang penyangga yang menandakan memulai kebahagiaan yang berakhir dengan kisah cinta yang tragis antara pria terpelajar dan seorang gadis cantik.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: A disillusioned assassin accepts one last hit in hopes of using his earnings to restore the vision of a singer he accidentally blinded.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh yang kecewa menerima satu serangan terakhir dengan harapan dapat menggunakan penghasilannya untuk mengembalikan penglihatan seorang penyanyi yang secara tidak sengaja dibutakannya.

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: A charming Huangmei Opera title, this is the story of Fei E, a General's daughter who grows up fooling everyone that she is a boy, including her two closest schoolmates.

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: Sebuah opera menarik yang menceritakan tentang Fei E, putri seorang Jenderal yang menyamar sebagai seorang anak laki-laki dan menipu semua orang, termasuk dua sahabatnya di sekolah.

programme.title: Secret Service Of Imperial...
programme.desc: The late Ming Dynasty is the time period when the influence and power of the court Eunuchs are at their peak. One in particular is Wang Zhen (Lau Wing), a vicious martial arts master who has distracted the weak-minded young Emperor with an endless supply of concubines to sate his passions, while plotting to seize power for himself.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: A dedicated wife uncovers a web of blackmail and deceit after her husband is conned by a conniving belly dancer. When the dancer is stabbed, things quickly go from bad to insane.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang setia menguak sebuah jaringan pemerasan dan penipuan setelah suaminya ditipu oleh seorang penari perut yang licik. Saat sang penari ditikam, keadaan pun menjadi semakin tak terkendali.

programme.title: Sweet And Wild
programme.desc: Hsiao Fang is a young girl not afraid to fight back against hooligans. Unfortunately, she mistakes the handsome Ma Ta-hai, for one such hoodlum. The two are immediately attracted but refuse to admit their true feelings.

programme.title: Sweet And Wild
programme.desc: Hsiao Fang adalah seorang gadis yang tidak takut untuk melawan para preman. Sayangnya, ia mengira Ma Ta-hai yang tampan sebagai salah satu preman itu. Keduanya saling tertarik, namun mereka menolak untuk mengakuinya.

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: A rich boy obsessed with martial arts encounters a mysterious man who teaches him combat skills, allowing him to win in a duel and marry his love.

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: A rich boy obsessed with martial arts encounters a mysterious man who teaches him combat skills, allowing him to win in a duel and marry his love.

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: Seorang bocah kaya yang terobsesi dengan seni bela diri bertemu pria misterius yang mengajarinya keterampilan bertarung, sehingga ia bisa memenangkan sebuah duel dan menikahi sang pujaan hati.

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: Seorang bocah kaya yang terobsesi dengan seni bela diri bertemu pria misterius yang mengajarinya keterampilan bertarung, sehingga ia bisa memenangkan sebuah duel dan menikahi sang pujaan hati.

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: This film is a coming-of-age tale of the lower-class Hong Kong teens in the 1960s. Wang is the title character, a hotheaded and rebellious teen who is tempted by the dark side.

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan kisah tentang para remaja miskin di Hong Kong pada tahun 1960-an. Wang berperan sebagai tokoh utama, seorang remaja pemarah dan pemberontak yang terpikat pada sisi gelap kehidupan.

programme.title: Ambush
programme.desc: A group of young elite commandos, led by Captain Drummond are tasked with collecting highly classified information that can change the fate of the war.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: Ling Yun plays the replacement hired for a popular band whose egotistic drummer quit to join a rival group.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: Ling Yun berperan sebagai pemain pengganti yang disewa oleh sebuah band populer setelah pemain drum mereka yang egois mengundurkan diri untuk bergabung dengan band saingan mereka.

programme.title: Return Of The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Sequel to the John Lo Mar/Chang Yang original finds immigrant Yeh Feng leaving jail to live with crooked uncle Wang Sha, but his girlfriend Ai Ti has married an abusive husband.

programme.title: Return Of The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Film sekuel ini bercerita tentang imigran Yeh Feng yang kabur dari penjara untuk tinggal bersama paman Wang Sha yang jahat. Namun, ternyata kekasihnya, Ai Ti, telah menikah dengan seorang pria yang kasar.

programme.title: Four Riders
programme.desc: This prime example of director/co-writer Chang Cheh's mastery takes place right after the Korean War, as a kung-fu master, combat instructor, explosives expert, and missle specialist heroically represent the Book of Revelation's four riders against murder, corruption, jealous and greed.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: As punishment for bad behaviour, the Jade Emperor's 7th daughter is banished from heaven and sent to live with the humans. There she falls in love with young villager, Dong Young.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: Sebagai hukuman atas perilaku buruknya, putri Kaisar Jade yang ke-tujuh diusir dari surga dan dikirim untuk tinggal bersama manusia. Di sana, ia jatuh cinta dengan seorang pemuda desa bernama Dong Young.

programme.title: The Magic Blade
programme.desc: Two rival swordsmen, the heroic Fu Hung Hsieh and the wealthy Yen Nan-Fei, must team up to prevent the legendary Peacock Dart from falling into the hands of Mr. Yu and his evil criminal underworld. Traps, poisons, and double-crossings are everywhere in this spooky swordplay thriller from the Shaw Bros. Studio.

programme.title: River Of Tears
programme.desc: Retired singer Fang lives happily with her husband and son. Tragedy happens when a man from her past returns to haunt her.

programme.title: River Of Tears
programme.desc: Fang adalah seorang mantan penyanyi yang hidup bahagia bersama suami dan putranya. Namun, tragedi terjadi saat seorang pria dari masa lalunya kembali menghantuinya.

programme.title: The Fantastic Magic Baby
programme.desc: In The Fantastic Magic Baby, director Chang Che weaves a wild and woolly yarn about how the legendary Monkey King and Goddess of Mercy battle and defeat the child god Hung Hai-erh then point him down the road to righteousness.

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Lo Wei helms this poetic romance that proves a perfect showcase for Ivy Ling Po's incredible talents, as a young scholar manipulated into marrying a nobleman's reluctant daughter.

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Lo Wei mengarahkan film romantis yang menampilkan bakat akting Ivy Ling Po nan luar biasa. Film ini bercerita tentang seorang sarjana muda yang diperdaya untuk menikahi seorang putri bangsawan.

programme.title: Return Of The Dead
programme.desc: Enchanted Shadow is about three stories. A husband and wife that discover they should be careful what they wish for, a naked female ghost seeks revenge and a dead prostitute returns as a ghost in the last tale.

programme.title: Return Of The Dead
programme.desc: Enchanted Shadow terdiri dari tiga kisah. Suami dan istri yang harus berhati-hati dengan apa yang mereka inginkan, hantu perempuan tanpa busana yang ingin balas dendam dan wanita tuna susila yang menjadi hantu.

programme.title: The Brave Archer 2
programme.desc: Kuo Tsing wins the hand of fair maiden Huang Yung. Almost immediately, however, clan rivalries leads to Kuo being wounded by Ouyang Feng and Huang being named new leader of the Beggar Clan.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team, can they team up to regain team's glory?

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua's hidden identity is accidentally revealed.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: Wei the jester, turned undercover spy, turned high ranking official in the Chinese imperial court, tries his best to deal with warring factions and deadly martial artists all vying for power.

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: Wei si badut, yang kemudian menjadi mata-mata rahasia, lalu menjadi pejabat tinggi di istana kekaisaran Tiongkok, berusaha sekuat tenaga untuk menghadapi faksi-faksi yang bertikai dan para ahli bela diri mematikan yang semuanya berebut kekuasaan.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society's conspiracy.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Look Out, Officer!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow is a delight in this supernatural action comedy about a murdered cop returning from beyond the grave to persuade a rookie (Chow) into avenging his death.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: A young Chinese warrior steals a sword from a famed swordsman and then escapes into a world of romantic adventure with a mysterious man in the frontier of the nation.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: Seorang prajurit muda Tiongkok mencuri pedang dari seorang pendekar pedang terkenal dan kemudian melarikan diri ke dunia petualangan romantis bersama seorang pria misterius di perbatasan negara.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: A military veteran, Wu Wei and an undercover cop, Tian Ming lead a team to rescue the hostages captured by a band of thugs in an island outside of Bangkok.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Seorang veteran militer, Wu Wei, dan seorang polisi yang tengah menyamar, Tian Ming, memimpin sebuah tim untuk menyelamatkan para sandera yang ditangkap oleh sekelompok penjahat di sebuah pulau di luar Bangkok.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: A frustrated young man afflicted with polio works as a paralegal for a corrupt lawyer. He gets passed onto him the technique for a strange power by a dying man, which turns him into an oil based superhero/villain.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda frustrasi yang menderita polio bekerja sebagai asisten hukum untuk seorang pengacara korup. Ia menerima teknik untuk mendapatkan kekuatan aneh dari seorang pria yang sekarat, yang mengubahnya menjadi pahlawan super/penjahat berbasis minyak.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: When a young man ignores a feng shui master's warning and decides to marry before turning 30, a series of mishaps begins to curse his life.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: The Bare-Footed Kid
programme.desc: A young man arrives in the city to work with the friend of his dead father. When their dye shop is burnt down by a local strongman, he decides to fight back to protect all of them and save the shop.

programme.title: The Bare-Footed Kid
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda tiba di kota untuk bekerja dengan teman mendiang sang ayah. Ketika toko pewarna mereka dibakar oleh seorang pemimpin geng setempat, ia memutuskan untuk melawan demi melindungi dan menyelamatkan toko.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: A story of the illegal immigrant experience of people from the mainland of China who have made it to Hong Kong for a better life.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: The head of a rich family dies and in his will leaves his fortune to his daughter. His son is enraged and uses a rubbish collector who looks the same as his sister to steal the fortune. The Uncle's son also wants a piece of the fortune and coerces a small time thief into stealing the will for his wild scheme.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: Kepala keluarga kaya meninggal dunia dan dalam wasiatnya mewariskan kekayaannya kepada putrinya. Putranya marah dan menggunakan seorang pengumpul sampah yang mirip dengan saudara perempuannya untuk mencuri kekayaan tersebut. Putra paman juga menginginkan bagian dari kekayaan itu dan memaksa seorang pencuri kecil untuk mencuri wasiat tersebut demi rencana jahatnya.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: The documentary highlights renowned Chinese Kung Fu masters in the film industry, showcasing Hong Kong's Kung Fu legacy over sixty years and capturing their daring lives.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyoroti para master Kung Fu Tiongkok yang terkenal di industri film, memamerkan warisan Kung Fu Hong Kong selama enam puluh tahun dan mengabadikan kehidupan mereka yang penuh tantangan.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist: Chen Zhen
programme.desc: The year is 1917 and Chen Zhen, believed to be dead, returns to Shanghai under a false name. He joins a mob boss for info on the Japanese incl. a long kill list and at night fights the Japanese masked.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist: Chen Zhen
programme.desc: The year is 1917 and Chen Zhen, believed to be dead, returns to Shanghai under a false name. He joins a mob boss for info on the Japanese incl. a long kill list and at night fights the Japanese masked.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist: Chen Zhen
programme.desc: Tahun 1917, Chen Zhen, yang diyakini telah meninggal, kembali ke Shanghai dengan nama palsu. Dia bergabung dengan seorang bos mafia untuk mendapatkan informasi tentang Jepang, termasuk daftar panjang orang yang ingin dibunuh, dan pada malam hari melawan orang-orang Jepang bertopeng.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist: Chen Zhen
programme.desc: Tahun 1917, Chen Zhen, yang diyakini telah meninggal, kembali ke Shanghai dengan nama palsu. Dia bergabung dengan seorang bos mafia untuk mendapatkan informasi tentang Jepang, termasuk daftar panjang orang yang ingin dibunuh, dan pada malam hari melawan orang-orang Jepang bertopeng.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 2
programme.desc: Grave robbers unearth preserved vampires. Transporting child vampire, its spell breaks, befriending locals. Parent vampires awaken, escape. Herbalist pursues to destroy them.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 2
programme.desc: Perampok kuburan menemukan vampir yang diawetkan. Saat mengangkut vampir anak, mantra yang mengikatnya hilang, dan ia berteman dengan penduduk setempat. Vampir orang tua terbangun dan melarikan diri. Tabib herbal mengejar untuk menghancurkan mereka.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: Behind The Yellow Line
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang pemalu dan pekerja kantoran, bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik dan ambisius yang sedang mengejar karirnya, serta seorang pria lain yang ramah namun penuh rahasia. Pertemuan ini membawa mereka ke dalam perjalanan emosional yang kompleks, penuh dengan kebingungan, kesalahpahaman, dan penemuan diri.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man takes up a challenge by ageing northern master Gong Yu Tian. Ip Man wins the fight, but is then defeated by Gong Yu Tian's daughter Gong Er, with whom he forms an emotional bond.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: The Monkey Is Back
programme.desc: Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl. But Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world.

programme.title: The Monkey Is Back
programme.desc: Monyet Batu, memberikan harapan kepada seorang gadis kecil nan putus asa. Namun, Monyet Batu dikalahkan dalam pertempuran melawan Dewa Perang bermata tiga, yang membuatnya kehilangan kekuatan dan jatuh ke dunia fana.

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh 2
programme.desc: The cheating husband goes bankrupt, and his house is soon to be taken by the government. A security guard is assigned to guard it while the husband goes missing. However, only the mistress stays alone in the house. Will the lonely, handsome guard and the heartbroken mistress hook up?

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: An imperial agent gets ridiculed for his various inventions, until his supportive wife encourages him to attend a conference, which's actually a trap to kill all the doctors serving the emperor, where his crazy inventions come in handy.

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: Seorang agen kekaisaran diejek karena berbagai penemuannya, hingga istrinya yang suportif mendorongnya untuk menghadiri sebuah konferensi, yang sebenarnya adalah jebakan untuk membunuh semua dokter yang melayani kaisar, di mana penemuan-penemuan gilanya menjadi berguna.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 3
programme.desc: Police officer Chow Sing Sing is assigned to work undercover investigating the murder of millionaire Million Wong, to whom Chow has an uncanny resemblance, by posing as an amnesiac Wong.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 3
programme.desc: Petugas polisi Chow Sing Sing ditugaskan untuk bekerja secara menyamar menyelidiki pembunuhan jutawan Million Wong, yang memiliki kemiripan luar biasa dengan Chow, dengan berpura-pura menjadi Wong yang menderita amnesia.

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh
programme.desc: Security guard Lee Go is assigned to keep guard at a house while the owner is away. However, a series of hilarious misunderstandings occur.

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh
programme.desc: Satpam Lee Go ditugaskan untuk menjaga sebuah rumah saat pemiliknya pergi. Namun, serangkaian kesalahpahaman lucu terjadi.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: Seorang pria tunanetra, You Ji Ren, bekerja di sebuah pabrik di pulau terpencil. Karena badai, pabrik itu terisolasi dan muncul sesosok monster yang membuat siapa pun berubah menjadi bayangan hitam jika melihatnya.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao's enemy.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: Petualangan bersejarah nan epik berlatar masa-masa penuh gejolak di masa Tiga Kerajaan. Cao Cao berusaha untuk memasukkan Guan Yu ke dalam pasukannya, tapi Guan tetap setia pada Liu Bei, yang merupakan musuh Cao.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi will inherit his dying grandfather's fortune with one condition, he has to be married in a month, otherwise the money goes to his uncle, Robert.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi akan mewarisi kekayaan kakeknya yang tengah sekarat dengan satu syarat, yaitu ia harus menikah dalam waktu sebulan. Jika tidak, warisan tersebut akan diberikan kepada sang paman yang bernama Robert.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Doubles Cause Troubles
programme.desc: Two squabbling cousins find themselves in more trouble than they can imagine after their tenant ends up dead. The gangsters and the police are both after them, and they have no idea what they have done wrong!

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business show of CGTN English Channel, bringing you the latest economic data, business trends and policies. And its 30-minute interview show BIZtalk, presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, to get you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: Acara bisnis unggulan CGTN English Channel, yang menyajikan data ekonomi, tren bisnis, dan kebijakan terbaru. Dan acara wawancara 30 menit BIZtalk, menyajikan profil 360 derajat para penggerak dan pengguncang industri, pionir teknologi, dan pembuat kebijakan, untuk memberi Anda kejelasan tentang apa yang terjadi di setiap aspek bisnis.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: Its mission is to explore the dramatically changing dynamics of international commerce through lively conversation in clear, jargon-busting language. From all over the world

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: Misinya adalah mengeksplorasi dinamika perdagangan internasional yang berubah secara dramatis melalui percakapan yang hidup dengan bahasa yang jelas dan tidak berbelit-belit. Dari seluruh dunia

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: Discover the latest news about life in China, from social issues, tech and sports to special reports on major events.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: Temukan berita terbaru tentang kehidupan di Tiongkok, mulai dari isu-isu sosial, teknologi dan olahraga hingga laporan khusus tentang peristiwa-peristiwa besar.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: The Amphitrite, Ep 1
programme.desc: This episode is about a convict transportation ship named the Amphitrite that was shipwrecked on its journey out to Australia. We delve into what life was like on the voyage and how it all went horribly wrong.

programme.title: The Amphitrite, Ep 2
programme.desc: A legendary merchant ship of 300 years ago, several mysterious letters of 300 years ago, a hundred year old French lighthouse, a tower guarding family with four generations of heritage, a French writer looking for ancient history... On the ancient Maritime Silk Road, a magnificent adventure started. A French writer who had lived in Guangdong for about 20 years, investigated in Guangdong, Beijing, Macaw, Paris, and Lorient, trying to unlock the secret of the French merchant ship "Amphitrite" which first sailed to Guangzhou 300 years ago, finally found a rarely known but amazing legend.

programme.title: The Amphitrite, Ep 3
programme.desc: A legendary merchant ship of 300 years ago, several mysterious letters of 300 years ago, a hundred year old French lighthouse, a tower guarding family with four generations of heritage, a French writer looking for ancient history... On the ancient Maritime Silk Road, a magnificent adventure started. A French writer who had lived in Guangdong for about 20 years, investigated in Guangdong, Beijing, Macaw, Paris, and Lorient, trying to unlock the secret of the French merchant ship "Amphitrite" which first sailed to Guangzhou 300 years ago, finally found a rarely known but amazing legend.

programme.title: Heartwarming Stories: Reunion
programme.desc: The story follows a group of old friends who reunite after many years apart. Each of them has lived a different life, carrying personal stories, unresolved wounds, and memories from the past.

programme.title: Heartwarming Stories: Reunion
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang sekelompok sahabat lama yang kembali dipertemukan dalam sebuah reuni setelah bertahun-tahun berpisah. Setiap dari mereka telah menjalani kehidupan yang berbeda, membawa cerita, luka, dan kenangan masa lalu yang belum sepenuhnya terselesaikan.

programme.title: Lost At Christmas
programme.desc: Two down-on-their-luck strangers come together to try and get home for Christmas.

programme.title: The Farewell
programme.desc: A Chinese family discovers their grandmother has only a short while left to live and decide to keep her in the dark, scheduling a wedding to gather before she dies.

programme.title: The Farewell
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga Tionghoa mengetahui nenek mereka hanya punya sedikit waktu lagi untuk hidup dan memutuskan untuk merahasiakannya, menjadwalkan pesta pernikahan untuk diadakan sebelum ia meninggal.

programme.title: Dark Corners: The Stalker
programme.desc: Susan lives a seemingly normal life but begins experiencing recurring nightmares about a serial killer stalking her. In these dreams, she exists as another woman named Karen, a mortuary assistant hunted by a mysterious “stalker.”

programme.title: Dark Corners: The Stalker
programme.desc: Seorang wanita bernama Susan menjalani kehidupan normal, namun mulai mengalami mimpi buruk berulang tentang sosok pembunuh berantai yang mengintainya. Dalam mimpi tersebut, ia hidup sebagai wanita lain bernama Karen yang bekerja di kamar mayat dan terus diburu oleh “stalker” misterius.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: As a widower tries to piece together his life in the wake of his wife's suicide, his daughter finds solace, at first, in her imaginary friend.

programme.title: Heartwarming Stories: Reunion
programme.desc: The story follows a group of old friends who reunite after many years apart. Each of them has lived a different life, carrying personal stories, unresolved wounds, and memories from the past.

programme.title: Diary Of A Lunatic
programme.desc: My name is Trew; this is the story of how I got a visit from the almighty and he asks me to write down everything he says. Its simple He spoke, I freaked, the unbelievable happened.

programme.title: Diary Of A Lunatic
programme.desc: Nama saya Trew; ini adalah kisah tentang bagaimana saya dikunjungi oleh Yang Mahakuasa dan Dia meminta saya untuk menuliskan semua yang Dia katakan. Sederhana saja, Dia berbicara, saya panik, hal yang luar biasa terjadi.

programme.title: Peter Bell
programme.desc: There is never a dull moment in 10-year-old Peter's life; his adventures appearing in newspaper headlines based unfortunately on outright lies. Together with his own little army, The Black Hand Club, Peter decides to right these wrongs.

programme.title: Peter Bell
programme.desc: Kehidupan Peter yang berusia 10 tahun tidak pernah membosankan; petualangannya sering muncul di berita utama surat kabar, yang sayangnya didasarkan pada kebohongan belaka. Bersama dengan pasukan kecilnya sendiri, Klub Tangan Hitam, Peter memutuskan untuk memperbaiki kesalahan-kesalahan ini.

programme.title: Dark Corners: The Stalker
programme.desc: Susan lives a seemingly normal life but begins experiencing recurring nightmares about a serial killer stalking her. In these dreams, she exists as another woman named Karen, a mortuary assistant hunted by a mysterious “stalker.”

programme.title: Dark Corners: The Stalker
programme.desc: Seorang wanita bernama Susan menjalani kehidupan normal, namun mulai mengalami mimpi buruk berulang tentang sosok pembunuh berantai yang mengintainya. Dalam mimpi tersebut, ia hidup sebagai wanita lain bernama Karen yang bekerja di kamar mayat dan terus diburu oleh “stalker” misterius.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: When a young girl becomes caught up in the dangerous and self-destructive world of drugs, her ex-pilot father struggles to save her.

programme.title: Avarice
programme.desc: A gifted archer must rescue her husband and daughter after they are abducted during a vicious home invasion.

programme.title: Avarice
programme.desc: Seorang pemanah berbakat harus menyelamatkan suami dan putrinya setelah mereka diculik selama perampokan rumah yang brutal.

programme.title: The Young And Prodigious...
programme.desc: A 10-year-old scientist secretly leaves his family's ranch in Montana where he lives with his cowboy father and scientist mother, and travels across the country aboard a freight train to receive an award at the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: The Young And Prodigious...

programme.title: The Young And Prodigious...
programme.desc: Seorang ilmuwan berusia 10 tahun diam-diam meninggalkan peternakan keluarganya di Montana tempat ia tinggal bersama ayah koboi dan ibunya ilmuwan, dan melakukan perjalanan melintasi negara dengan menaiki kereta barang untuk menerima penghargaan di Smithsonian Institution.

programme.desc: Ida "Red" Walker may not survive her terminal illness while incarcerated for armed robbery. She turns to her son, Wyatt, for one last job and a chance to regain her freedom.

programme.desc: The story follows a group of old friends who reunite after many years apart. Each of them has lived a different life, carrying personal stories, unresolved wounds, and memories from the past.

programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang sekelompok sahabat lama yang kembali dipertemukan dalam sebuah reuni setelah bertahun-tahun berpisah. Setiap dari mereka telah menjalani kehidupan yang berbeda, membawa cerita, luka, dan kenangan masa lalu yang belum sepenuhnya terselesaikan.

programme.title: A Perfect Plan
programme.desc: Four notorious thieves wake up in a fortified warehouse and are forced by a cunning master thief to plan and commit an extraordinary diamond heist.

programme.desc: The story of the children who live in Bullerbyn, Sweden, through the spring and summer months.

programme.title: The Children Of Noisy Village

programme.title: My Fatal Social Following
programme.desc: Julia, a lonely and ostracized teenager, is coming to terms with the disappearance of her best friend when she discovers a mysterious social media account called 'The Family'.

programme.title: My Fatal Social Following
programme.desc: Julia, seorang remaja yang kesepian dan dikucilkan, sedang berusaha menerima kenyataan hilangnya sahabatnya ketika dia menemukan sebuah akun media sosial misterius bernama 'The Family'.

programme.title: Midway To Heaven
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Midway To Heaven
programme.desc: Sudah bertahun-tahun sejak Ned Stevens, seorang pria menawan yang sukses berkat kerja kerasnya sendiri, kehilangan istrinya, Kate, karena kanker. Namun, ia masih belum bisa melupakan kenangan tentang istrinya dan melanjutkan hidupnya. Tetapi ketika Liz membawa pulang pacar baru dari kampus, Ned mendapati dunianya yang nyaman terbalik ketika Liz mencoba mengalihkan perhatiannya kepada Carol, seorang wanita lajang menarik yang tinggal di lingkungan Ned.

programme.desc: Caleb, a former government assassin in hiding, who resurfaces when his protégé, the equally deadly killer known as Banshee, discovers a bounty has been placed on Caleb's head.

programme.title: Bulletstorm
programme.desc: Commando Grayson Hunt, his team, and their evil boss General Sarrano, whom they want dead, crash land on the planet Stygia, a former elite resort now overrun with killer plants, feral cannibal gangs and monsters with acid for blood.

programme.title: Bulletstorm
programme.desc: Komando Grayson Hunt, timnya, dan bos jahat mereka, Jenderal Sarrano yang ingin mereka bunuh terpaksa mendarat darurat di planet Stygia, sebuah resor elit yang dulu mewah namun kini dipenuhi tumbuhan pembunuh, gerombolan kanibal liar, dan monster-monster yang darahnya berisi asam.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavioral modification program.

programme.title: Valley Of Dreams
programme.desc: Located in northwest New Mexico and known for its unique badland landscape is the Ah Shi Sle Pah Wilderness. The otherworldly rock formations and petrified wood make it a great destination for those who want to get away. We spent 5 hours wandering around the area, seeing virtually nobody and could have easily stayed longer and still not seen it all. If you're looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you.

programme.title: Valley Of Dreams
programme.desc: Terletak di barat laut New Mexico dan terkenal dengan lanskap badland-nya yang unik, terdapat kawasan Ah Shi Sle Pah Wilderness. Formasi batuan yang tampak seperti dari dunia lain serta kayu yang membatu menjadikan tempat ini destinasi yang sempurna bagi mereka yang ingin melarikan diri sejenak. Kami menghabiskan 5 jam menjelajahi kawasan tersebut, hampir tidak bertemu siapa pun, dan sebenarnya bisa saja tinggal lebih lama tanpa sempat menjelajahi semuanya. Jika Anda mencari petualangan yang tidak biasa dan tak terlupakan, tempat ini cocok untuk Anda.

programme.title: Skellig: The Owl Man
programme.desc: After moving with his family into a new home, a boy discovers a bird-like man living in the old garage on their property.

programme.title: Skellig: The Owl Man
programme.desc: Setelah pindah bersama keluarganya ke rumah baru, seorang anak laki-laki menemukan seorang pria mirip burung tinggal di garasi lama di properti mereka.

programme.title: Atomic Kids
programme.desc: A uranium prospector is eating a peanut butter sandwich in the desert where atom bomb tests are being done. He becomes radioactive, and helps the FBI break up an enemy spy ring.

programme.title: Atomic Kids
programme.desc: Seorang penambang uranium sedang menikmati sandwich selai kacang di gurun tempat uji coba bom atom sedang dilakukan. Ia menjadi radioaktif, dan membantu FBI membongkar jaringan mata-mata musuh.

programme.title: Escape From Planet Earth
programme.desc: Astronaut Scorch Supernova finds himself caught in a trap when he responds to an SOS from a notoriously dangerous alien planet.

programme.title: Escape From Planet Earth
programme.desc: Astronaut Scorch Supernova terjebak dalam jebakan saat ia menanggapi sinyal SOS dari planet alien yang terkenal berbahaya.

Formasi batuan yang tampak seperti dari dunia lain serta kayu yang membatu menjadikan tempat ini destinasi yang sempurna bagi mereka yang ingin melarikan diri sejenak. Kami menghabiskan 5 jam menjelajahi kawasan tersebut, hampir tidak bertemu siapa pun, dan sebenarnya bisa saja tinggal lebih lama tanpa sempat menjelajahi semuanya. Jika Anda mencari petualangan yang tidak biasa dan tak terlupakan, tempat ini cocok untuk Anda.

programme.title: You Gotta Believe
programme.desc: A Little League baseball team of misfits dedicates their season to a player's dying father. In doing so, they accomplish the impossible by reaching the World Series finals in a game that became an ESPN instant classic.

programme.title: You Gotta Believe
programme.desc: Sebuah tim bisbol Liga Kecil yang terdiri dari orang-orang yang tidak cocok mendedikasikan musim mereka untuk mengenang ayah seorang pemain yang sedang sekarat. Dengan begitu, mereka mencapai hal yang mustahil dengan mencapai final Seri Dunia dalam pertandingan yang langsung menjadi klasik di ESPN.

programme.title: Atomic Kids
programme.desc: A uranium prospector is eating a peanut butter sandwich in the desert where atom bomb tests are being done. He becomes radioactive, and helps the FBI break up an enemy spy ring.

programme.title: Atomic Kids
programme.desc: Seorang penambang uranium sedang menikmati sandwich selai kacang di gurun tempat uji coba bom atom sedang dilakukan. Ia menjadi radioaktif, dan membantu FBI membongkar jaringan mata-mata musuh.

programme.title: Song Of The Sea
programme.desc: Ben, a young Irish boy, and his little sister Saoirse, a girl who can turn into a seal, go on an adventure to free the fairies and save the spirit world.

programme.title: Valley Of Dreams
programme.desc: Located in northwest New Mexico and known for its unique badland landscape is the Ah Shi Sle Pah Wilderness. The otherworldly rock formations and petrified wood make it a great destination for those who want to get away. We spent 5 hours wandering around the area, seeing virtually nobody and could have easily stayed longer and still not seen it all. If you're looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Fresh from performing at the closing ceremony of the Olympics in her hometown of Pyeongchang, South Korea, K-pop sensation CL answers her door at the historic Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel in Los Angeles, where she’s currently camped out for a spell, when Vogue comes knocking and then knocks down 73 rapid-fire questions about Kanye West, her favorite candle, Borat cameos, Disneyland, “Purple Lamborghini,” eyeliner as the ideal accessory, being a cat person, and how to say “cheers!” in Korean.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: A day in the life of supermodel Cindy Crawford includes working out, lunching with Helena Christensen, and lighting the Empire State Building.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Aziz Ansari
programme.desc: On the eve of the Met Gala, "Master of None" co-creator Aziz Ansari makes us a smoothie while answering 73 unexpected questions. Aziz talks about his childhood crush on Elaine Benes, his displeasure with the term "foodie," and tries to rank his favorite Kanye West albums.

programme.title: Christmas Cheer
programme.desc: Megan, the captain of the local high school cheer leading squad, has been volunteered to work at the local food bank by her father during her Christmas holiday break. Megan is quite distressed as she wanted to shop and hang out with her two best friends

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: A man implicated in the triple homicide of three Hollywood starlets begins his own investigation. Needing assistance, he enlists the two detectives on his tail in order to expose a conspiracy more explosive than any of them imagined.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Hip-hop superstar Cardi B invites Vogue into her grandmother's apartment in New York City and answers 73 rapid-fire questions. As Cardi puts baby Kulture to sleep, she talks about her relationship with Offset, her interest in politics, her newest album, and the current state of women's rights.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Esther Perel
programme.desc: World-renowned psychotherapist Esther Perel is quite busy during these trying times. More than ever, people are looking for ways to balance their lives.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Web...
programme.desc: Den of Thieves star 50 Cent answers the Internet's most searched questions about himself. Did 50 Cent go to college? Is 50 Cent a billionaire? Is 50 Cent Jamaican??

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Web...
programme.desc: Bintang film Den of Thieves, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika??

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley reveals how she met her husband, which product she absolutely cannot live without, and how she travels to and from Fashion Week without hassle thanks to Lexus who provides courtesy transportation for designers, models, editors, retailers and industry professionals as the official automotive sponsor of New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Amy Adams
programme.desc: We follow Amy Adams to her Vogue cover shoot with Annie Leibovitz and ask her 73 questions about her life and what we can expect to see from her next.

programme.title: Bright Sky
programme.desc: A single mother escapes a dark past to a small town. As she begins to build a new life, she comes across an outlaw looking for redemption.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: When it comes to Vogue, legendary supermodel Cindy Crawford has done it all. The one thing the prolific cover star hasn't done yet is answer 73 Questions. Cindy invites Vogue inside her Malibu home and discusses her family, her all-time favorite photo shoot and gives her best advice for up-and-coming models.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo is the most underrated charmer on the red carpet. He has dimples! He has quippy one-liners! And perhaps most importantly of all, he has the style to match.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Bella Hadid
programme.desc: While Bella feeds horses and cuddles a baby goat, she talks about her modeling career and where she's at at this point in her life. Bella discusses her love of horse riding, her obsession with chocolate, and ongoing passion for photography.

programme.title: Buckley's Chance
programme.desc: Ridley and his mother move to Western Australia, living with estranged grandfather Spencer. Ridley is lost in the outback, but saves a dingo, Buckley, forming a bond.

programme.title: Buckley's Chance
programme.desc: Ridley dan ibunya pindah ke Australia Barat, tinggal bersama kakeknya, Spencer, yang sudah lama tidak mereka temui. Ridley tersesat di pedalaman, tetapi ia menyelamatkan seekor dingo bernama Buckley dan menjalin ikatan dengannya.

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: An expert locksmith is released from prison and pulled back into a world of crooked cops and small-town gangsters, despite the future he hoped to build with his ex-fiancé, a detective, and their daughter.

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Seorang ahli kunci dibebaskan dari penjara dan ditarik kembali ke dunia polisi yang korup dan gangster kota kecil, terlepas dari masa depan yang ia harapkan untuk dibangun bersama mantan tunangannya, seorang detektif, dan putri mereka.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: as a global K-pop phenomenon with their first major visit to Los Angeles, where the seven-member band was greeted by rabid crowds and an onslaught of media attention. On a rare free evening toward the end of their whirlwind trip right after the AMAs, just before Ellen the boys boarded a party bus with Vogue and took the city by storm.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Chrissy Teigen
programme.desc: Just in time for Halloween, Chrissy Teigen invites Vogue into her beautiful (and haunted?) Beverly Hills home and answers 73 Questions. In this episode, presented by the Google Assistant, Chrissy tells us some of her greatest fears, her worst habits, what life is like while John Legend is on tour and much more.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Watch "Dickinson" star Hailee Steinfeld get ready for her red-carpet premiere. There's plenty of glamour in Steinfeld's day, but she also makes time for the little things. Selfies in Times Square? Room service fries? Why not?

programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B

As Cardi puts baby Kulture to sleep, she talks about her relationship with Offset, her interest in politics, her newest album, and the current state of women's rights.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: Baby Bulldog
programme.desc: Animal-lover Amber desperately wants a dog to love. When she falls for Shadow, she takes on her family and city hall to fight for her new best friend in a race against the clock.

programme.title: Minor Premise
programme.desc: Attempting to surpass his father's legacy, a reclusive neuroscientist becomes entangled in his own experiment, pitting ten fragments of his consciousness against each other.

programme.title: Minor Premise
programme.desc: Saat mencoba melampaui warisan ayahnya, seorang ilmuwan saraf yang tertutup menjadi terjerat dalam eksperimennya sendiri, dengan mengadu sepuluh fragmen kesadarannya satu sama lain.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Amy Adams
programme.desc: We follow Amy Adams to her Vogue cover shoot with Annie Leibovitz and ask her 73 questions about her life and what we can expect to see from her next.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Alicia Keys
programme.desc: Alicia Keys invites Vogue into her wonderful home and answers 73 rapid-fire questions. As Alicia answers questions about life and love, she plays pool and air hockey with her son Egypt, gives a tour of her art gallery, and improvises a song on the piano.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Alicia Keys
programme.desc: Alicia Keys invites Vogue into her wonderful home and answers 73 rapid-fire questions. As Alicia answers questions about life and love, she plays pool and air hockey with her son Egypt, gives a tour of her art gallery, and improvises a song on the piano.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Bella Hadid
programme.desc: While Bella feeds horses and cuddles a baby goat, she talks about her modeling career and where she's at at this point in her life. Bella discusses her love of horse riding, her obsession with chocolate, and ongoing passion for photography.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Actress, filmmaker, and Barbie director Greta Gerwig answers 73 rapid-fire questions while ambling around Sony Pictures Studios. programme.title: 73 Questions With Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di sekitar Sony Pictures Studios. programme.desc: The east coast is under attack by monsters. The mechs attempting to fight them off are better armed than their precursors, but so are the creatures.

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Seorang ahli kunci dibebaskan dari penjara dan ditarik kembali ke dunia polisi yang korup dan gangster kota kecil, terlepas dari masa depan yang ia harapkan untuk dibangun bersama mantan tunangannya, seorang detektif, dan putri mereka.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow

programme.title: Spirit Of Love: M. Glenn Story
programme.desc: Pemain NBA Mike “Stinger” Glenn memerankan dirinya sendiri dalam film yang luar biasa ini, yang terinspirasi dari kamp-kamp bola basket yang ia selenggarakan untuk para penyandang tuna rungu dan gangguan pendengaran. Melalui pemilihan pemain yang unik, para aktor penyandang tuna rungu dan gangguan pendengaran serta aktor pendengar bekerja sama untuk menghadirkan sebuah film yang otentik, menawan, penuh persaingan, dan menantang.

programme.title: The New Locals S2, Ep 2
programme.desc: In a world increasingly interconnected yet often fractured, The New Locals offers a window into the lives, histories, and resilience of ethnic communities around the globe. This emotionally compelling series delves deep into cities and neighbourhoods where minority cultures have thrived, preserved their identities, and adapted within larger, often foreign societies.
